name: esp32jtag_port_d_loopback
notes: Port D (P3) → Port A (P0) loopback self-test. Drives static GPIO patterns and 132 MHz counter on Port D; captures on Port A channels 0-3 via Logic Analyzer. WIRING: 4 jumper wires P3pin0→P0pin0, P3pin1→P0pin1, P3pin2→P0pin2, P3pin3→P0pin3. Port D and Port A must be in Logic Analyzer mode (default).

preflight.note: No preflight — instrument is self-tested via its own web API.
